channel.title: Hat-in-Ring Radar — daily movement
channel.description: What moved on the 2028 presidential signal tracker, rebuilt daily. Status is not support.

item.title: What moved on the 2028 board — 2026-06-13
item.description: Top movers: Cory Booker +14, Ro Khanna +12, Jo Jorgensen +8, Ruben Gallego +8, Gina Raimondo -8
